## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what changed and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new capability
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — docs only
- [ ] refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] test — tests only
- [ ] chore — build / deps / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes
- [ ] I manually recorded → transcribed → typed at least once with this change
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md`, `docs/*`) if behavior changed
- [ ] No audio files, API keys, or `.env` committed
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything non-obvious: tradeoffs, things skipped on purpose, follow-up PRs. -->
